issues.description: Counter cards trigger on 'Counter', not 'OnAttacked'. The trigger should be 'Counter'.
Second action should be 'ForceDiscard' (trash from deck), not 'TrashFromHand' (trash from hand). The card text says 'trash 1 card from the top of your deck'.
Second effect object is extraneous and incorrect. There should be only one effect with trigger 'Counter'. The 'DrawCard' action does not appear in the card text.
ForceDiscard action targeting deck should not have an empty filter object; it should specify deck source or be implicit in the action type.
